creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
After this patch when I do:

cd /usr/ports/www/lighttpd
make config

I get this message:

"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gnome.mk", line 662: The Pre include part of =
bsd.gnome.mk part is not included. Did you forget WANT_GNOME=3Dyes =
before bsd.port.pre.mk?

Also it=92s not possible to upgrade lighttpd.=
